title: docket registry (.docket.json)
description: Config for docket: top-level app settings, a defaults layer, and per-project overrides.

$schema.description: Pointer to this JSON Schema (read and ignored by docket at runtime).

port.description: Default port for `docket serve` (the --port flag overrides).

defaults.description: Baseline for every per-project knob; a project inherits anything it does not set.

projects.description: One entry per repo; name + path required, every defaults knob optional as an override.

name.description: Unique display name for the project.

path.description: Repo root; ~ and $VARS are expanded. Must be an existing directory.

allowed_tools.description: Tools passed to `claude --allowedTools` (replace-only; a project's list fully replaces the defaults list).

instruction_template.description: stdin instruction naming the plan file; {path} is substituted with the plan's repo-relative path.

model.description: Model passed to `claude --model`; null lets Claude Code pick its default.

planning_dir.description: Repo-relative directory holding plan markdown files.

implementation_dir.description: Repo-relative directory for docket's status sidecars.

claude_bin.description: Claude Code executable; resolved on PATH or as an explicit file. ~ and $VARS expanded.

claude_extra_args.description: Extra flags appended to the `claude` invocation (escape hatch; do not restate the streaming flags).
